basic_details.job_title: DCHS East Godavari Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for General Duty Attender, Lab Attendant Posts
basic_details.organization_name: District Coordinator of Hospital Services East Godavari (DCHS East Godavari)
basic_details.short_information: District Coordinator of Hospital Services East Godavari (DCHS East Godavari) Recruitment 2026: District Coordinator of Hospital Services East Godavari has released the official notification for 6 Paramedical and supporting staff posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid healthcare jobs.

age_limit.age_details: Max: 42 years (with relaxations up to 52 years)
age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 42 years Age Relaxation: SC/ST/BC/EWS: 05 years Ex-service Men: 03 years Differently abled persons: 10 years

qualification.education_qualification: SSC/10th class or its equivalent, Lab Attendant Course or Intermediate (Lab Attendant Vocational Course)
qualification.details: General Duty Attender: SSC/10th class or its equivalent Lab Attendant: SSC/10th or its equivalent. Must Possess Lab Attendant Course or Intermediate (Lab Attendant Vocational Course) conducted by the Board of Inter Education, AP or from any other institution recognized by the Govt of A.P.

selection_process: Aggregate of marks obtained in qualifying examination (75%) Weightage for completed years after acquiring requisite qualification (up to 10 marks) Weightage for contract/outsourcing service including COVID-19 service (up to 15%) Weightage to contract employment based on working area
how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.eastgodavari.nic.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 06-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download DCHS East Godavari Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download DCHS East Godavari Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.district_coordinator_of_hospital_service: SSC/10th class or its equivalent, Lab Attendant Course or Intermediate (Lab Attendant Vocational Course)
Max: 42 years (with relaxations up to 52 years)

content_sections.heading: DCHS East Godavari Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the DCHS East Godavari Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download DCHS East Godavari Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: General Duty Attender: SSC/10th class or its equivalent Lab Attendant: SSC/10th or its equivalent. Must Possess Lab Attendant Course or Intermediate (Lab Attendant Vocational Course) conducted by the Board of Inter Education, AP or from any other institution recognized by the Govt of A.P.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 42 years Age Relaxation: SC/ST/BC/EWS: 05 years Ex-service Men: 03 years Differently abled persons: 10 years

content_sections.heading: DCHS East Godavari Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
Selection Process
content_sections.text: Aggregate of marks obtained in qualifying examination (75%) Weightage for completed years after acquiring requisite qualification (up to 10 marks) Weightage for contract/outsourcing service including COVID-19 service (up to 15%) Weightage to contract employment based on working area

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: www.eastgodavari.nic.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 06-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: DCHS East Godavari Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DCHS East Godavari Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the DCHS East Godavari Recruitment 2026 is 06 July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies released by DCHS East Godavari?
faq.answer: DCHS East Godavari has released a total of 6 vacancies for Paramedical and supporting staff posts.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for the General Duty Attender post?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification required for the General Duty Attender post is SSC/10th class or its equivalent.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for these positions?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a salary of Rs. 15,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. What is the maximum age limit for applying to these posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for applying is 42 years, with relaxations available for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for OC candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for OC candidates is Rs. 350/-.

faq.question: Q7. How will the selection process be conducted?
faq.answer: Selection will be based on the aggregate of marks in the qualifying examination, weightage for experience, and contract/outsourcing service.

faq.question: Q8. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline.

faq.question: Q9. Where should the filled application form be submitted?
faq.answer: Filled applications should be submitted at the specified counters in the O/o DCHS, East Godavari District, Community Health Centre Campus, Kovvuru.

faq.question: Q10. Is there any age relaxation for SC/ST/BC/EWS candidates?
faq.answer: Yes, there is an age relaxation of 05 years for SC/ST/BC/EWS candidates.
